economic_notes: First Nation operates solar energy projects (NFN Solar LP, Nipissing Solar SPN LP), forestry (N'Bisiing Forestry Inc.), community development (Nipissing Community Developments LP), and business park (Bineshii Projects LP). Partnership with Miller Paving Limited. Nipissing 2013 Boundary Claim Trust holds $103.6M in restricted investments. Robinson Huron Treaty Trust beneficiary.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). The Boundary Claim Trust (consolidated) holds $103.7M in restricted investments generating $9.9M investment income plus $1.36M unrealized gains, which significantly inflate the surplus and accumulated surplus figures. The Trust is consolidated on a December 31, 2021 period-end basis. No schedule of remuneration was included in the extracted text. Long-term debt note shows $6,194,164 but balance sheet shows $6,330,621 — difference likely relates to CMHC Phase 11 loan of $574,000 with terms to be settled. Deferred revenue increased substantially from $13.2M to $31.3M largely due to Water Treatment Plant Upgrades ($9.8M) and other capital/program deferrals. No budget information presented. COVID-19 note included. OSR calculated as 'Other' revenue line only ($8,370,444) as all other lines are government transfers.
